summary: Fertilizer data point added to Real Sector successfully. Backend API /api/fertilizer returns latest (257), mom_change_pct (-82.10%), categories (Urea/DAP), and history (193 data points). Frontend shows Fertilizer tile with value, month (January 2026), and MoM change. Modal has stacked bars (Urea green + DAP blue) with Total yellow line. All series toggles (Total/Urea/DAP) are deselectable with 0.42 opacity when inactive. Last series cannot be deselected. Time range selector works (1Y/2Y/5Y/ALL). Regression: Auto Vehicles and 2/3 Wheelers tiles still render and modals function correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/fertilizer returns HTTP 200
Fertilizer API returns latest with total, urea, dap, month, date, unit
Fertilizer API returns mom_change_pct (-82.10%)
Fertilizer API returns categories array with urea and dap
Fertilizer API returns history array (193 data points) with date, total, urea, dap
Fertilizer API history is chronologically ordered (oldest to newest)
Auto Vehicles API regression: returns HTTP 200
Auto Vehicles API regression: returns production and sales data
Real Sector panel includes Fertilizer tile
Fertilizer tile displays value (257)
Fertilizer tile displays month (January 2026)
Fertilizer tile displays MoM change (-82.10%)
Click Fertilizer tile opens Fertilizer modal
Fertilizer modal title: Fertilizer Sales/Offtake
Fertilizer modal has time range selector (1Y/2Y/5Y/ALL)
Fertilizer modal has stacked bar chart (Urea green + DAP blue)
Fertilizer modal has Total line (yellow)
Series toggle Total is deselectable (opacity becomes 0.42)
Series toggle Urea is deselectable
Series toggle DAP is deselectable
Last active series cannot be deselected (stays at opacity 1)
Series toggles can be re-enabled (opacity restores to 1)
Time range 5Y selection works
Time range ALL selection shows full history from 2010
Modal close button works
Regression: LSM tile visible in Real Sector
Regression: Auto Vehicles tile visible in Real Sector
Regression: 2/3 Wheelers tile visible in Real Sector
Regression: Auto Vehicles modal opens and closes
Regression: 2/3 Wheelers modal opens and closes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fertilizer feature fully implemented. Backend fetches data from FERTILIZER_SERIES (TS_GP_RLS_SALEFERT_M dataset) with total, urea, and dap series. Frontend has FertilizerModal.js with ComposedChart showing stacked bars (Urea+DAP) and Total line. Series toggles allow deselect with visual dimming (opacity 0.42). Minimum one series must remain active. RealSectorPanel.js includes Fertilizer tile alongside LSM, Auto Vehicles, and 2/3 Wheelers.
